decisions.briefing: Market data is unavailable today, making it difficult to assess conditions with confidence. More importantly, available cash sits at $477.14 — just below the $500 threshold required to open a new position, so no new buys are possible regardless. All 6 existing positions are being held while we wait for more data and for cash to accumulate from any profit-target or stop-loss exits.

market_education.summary_en: No market data was available for today's session, preventing a full assessment of intraday drivers. When data feeds are interrupted or delayed, it typically reflects either a public holiday, a technical disruption, or a pre-market window where pricing hasn't yet populated. Prudent portfolio management under data uncertainty means holding existing positions rather than making new commitments based on incomplete information.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場數據無法取得，無法完整評估盤中走勢。當數據來源中斷或延遲時，通常反映公眾假期、技術故障，或尚未進入正式交易時段。在資訊不完整的情況下，審慎的投資組合管理方式是持有現有部位，避免在缺乏依據的狀況下做出新的承諾。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag refers to the performance cost of holding uninvested cash in a portfolio — cash earns little to nothing while the market potentially rises. In this portfolio, $477.14 sits idle below the minimum deployment threshold, meaning it contributes nothing to returns. Managing cash drag means either deploying cash efficiently when opportunities arise, or accepting the small drag as a tradeoff for flexibility and downside protection.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「現金拖累」（Cash Drag）是指投資組合中持有未投入資金所帶來的績效損耗——現金幾乎沒有收益，而市場可能同期上漲。本組合目前有$477.14閒置現金，低於最低部署門檻，對報酬率毫無貢獻。有效管理現金拖累，意味著在機會出現時迅速部署資金，或接受這小幅拖累，以換取靈活性與下行保護空間。
